scripts.codegen:sepolia: pnpm run generate:sepolia && graph codegen subgraph.sepolia.yaml
scripts.build:sepolia: pnpm run codegen:sepolia && graph build subgraph.sepolia.yaml
scripts.deploy:sepolia: pnpm run build:sepolia && goldsky subgraph deploy for-sepolia/0.0.1 --path ./build
scripts.codegen:base: pnpm run generate:base && graph codegen subgraph.base.yaml
scripts.build:base: pnpm run codegen:base && graph build subgraph.base.yaml
scripts.deploy:base: pnpm run build:base && goldsky subgraph deploy for-base/0.0.0 --path ./build
scripts.codegen:localhost: pnpm run generate:localhost && graph codegen subgraph.localhost.yaml
scripts.build:localhost: pnpm run codegen:localhost && graph build subgraph.localhost.yaml
scripts.deploy:localhost: pnpm run build:localhost && graph deploy --node http://localhost:8020 --ipfs http://localhost:5001 --version-label v0.0.1 for/localhost subgraph.localhost.yaml
